creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report Olga. 

From the boot log, we see vtnet0 driver is attached with a MAC address.

What does 'impossible to configure it' mean? How was this tested and what were the results/symptoms errors?

We're also going to need a lot more information in order to reproduce and reproduce the issue. Please use 'attachments' for large text instead of pasting in comments

- Exact FreeBSD version (and image type) used
- Exact VirtualBox version and Host OS version used
- Type of VirtualBox networking used (at host level)
- Full VirtualBox guest log (compressed if necessary)

If you're able to, please also test ('boot only' image is fine):

- 12.3-RELEASE image
- 13.0-RELEASE image
- Latest 13-STABLE image
- Latest 14-CURRENT image
